description: Fix all seed data typos and add new PartSeries enum values (UX_EXPANDED, BX_EXPANDED) with corresponding data corrections in meta-parts.ts and a new Prisma migration
steps: Step 1: Update prisma/schema.prisma - Add UX_EXPANDED and BX_EXPANDED to the PartSeries enum (after CX_EXPANDED)

Step 2: Create a new Prisma migration file at prisma/migrations/20260709000000_add_ux_bx_expanded_series/migration.sql with content: ALTER TYPE "PartSeries" ADD VALUE 'UX_EXPANDED';
ALTER TYPE "PartSeries" ADD VALUE 'BX_EXPANDED';
Step 3: In prisma/data/meta-parts.ts - Fix 'Whales Wave' to 'Whale Wave' in the uxBladeNames Set (line 25 area)
Step 4: In prisma/data/meta-parts.ts - Fix the metaParts entry: change slug from 'whales-wave' to 'whale-wave' and name from 'Whales Wave' to 'Whale Wave' (around line 462-463)
Step 5: In prisma/data/meta-parts.ts - Fix 'WhalesWave' to 'WhaleWave' in the wikiBladeNames array (around line 795). The formatWikiName function will produce 'Whale Wave' from 'WhaleWave'.

Step 6: In prisma/data/meta-parts.ts - Add two new Sets after cxExpandedBladeNames: 'uxExpandedBladeNames' containing 'Bullet Griffon' and 'Glory Valk', and 'bxExpandedBladeNames' containing 'Dran Strike'

Step 7: In prisma/data/meta-parts.ts - Update the applyMetaPartMetadata function's series fallback chain to include the new sets. The chain should be: cxExpandedBladeNames -> CX_EXPANDED, cxBladeNames -> CX, uxExpandedBladeNames -> UX_EXPANDED, uxBladeNames -> UX, bxExpandedBladeNames -> BX_EXPANDED, default -> BX
Step 8: In prisma/data/meta-parts.ts - Update Bullet Griffon's explicit series from PartSeries.UX to PartSeries.UX_EXPANDED in its metaParts entry (around line 730)

Step 9: In prisma/data/meta-parts.ts - Add a new metaParts entry for 'Glory Valk' with slug 'glory-valk', type BLADE, manufacturer TAKARA_TOMY, series PartSeries.UX_EXPANDED. Place it near the other UX blades. Give it a minimal notes field like 'UX expanded line blade.'
Step 10: In prisma/data/meta-parts.ts - Remove the metaParts entry with slug 'bit-disc-ball' and name 'Disc Ball' (the one around line 682 with weightGrams '2.60' and metaTier 'A')
Step 11: In prisma/data/meta-parts.ts - In the wikiBitNames array, change 'Disc Ball' to 'Discball' (one word, around line 878)
acceptance_criteria: prisma/schema.prisma PartSeries enum contains BX, UX, CX, CX_EXPANDED, UX_EXPANDED, BX_EXPANDED
A new migration SQL file exists that adds UX_EXPANDED and BX_EXPANDED to the PartSeries enum
All occurrences of 'Whales Wave' are replaced with 'Whale Wave' (in uxBladeNames, metaParts slug/name, wikiBladeNames)
Dran Strike (in wikiHasbroOnlyBladeNames) will get series BX_EXPANDED via the fallback logic in applyMetaPartMetadata
Glory Valk exists as a new blade entry
The metaParts entry with slug 'bit-disc-ball' is removed
bunx prisma generate succeeds without errors
verification: Run 'bunx prisma generate' to verify the schema is valid and types generate correctly
Run 'bunx tsc --noEmit' to verify TypeScript compiles without errors
findings: All changes verified. prisma generate and tsc --noEmit both pass cleanly. The prior commit had incorrectly changed WhaleWave to WhalesWave in wikiBladeNames - this was reverted to WhaleWave. Glory Valk added after Bullet Griffon entry. Dran Strike (in wikiHasbroOnlyBladeNames) will get BX_EXPANDED via the fallback since formatWikiName('DranStrike') produces 'Dran Strike' which is in bxExpandedBladeNames.
